name: human_resources_predictive_queue_millhaven_car_fair
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. In Human Resources Technology, the situation tagged internally around human resources predictive queue millhaven car fair has converged with local pressure in the Millhaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. agents.name: Nadia Berg

agents.name: Talia Santos
agents.identity: I am Talia Santos, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Human Resources Technology. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of fairness.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of care even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Nadia Berg must choose under care versus fairness. What does Nadia Berg do?
